reasoning: The pink/salmon health bar fill is clearly locatable against the dark teal and dark-red dungeon tile backgrounds — the bright warm hue pops immediately within 0.5s. Silhouette is unambiguous: a wide horizontal rectangle with a white highlight stripe. No confusion with other scene entities (slime is purple, tiles are teal/grey/crimson, buttons are blue/orange). Dark-area visibility is acceptable; the bar sits over a mid-tone tile transition and retains contrast. Main concerns: (1) the smooth gradient fill style reads as slightly 'pasted on' against the pixel-art dungeon tileset, creating a minor native-vs-pasted tension; (2) no visible border/outline means the bar could lose definition if ever placed over a lighter background; (3) mid-screen floating placement makes it momentarily ambiguous whether it is a world object or HUD element. Echoes cleanliness is otherwise fine — uncluttered, bright, single warm hue. Scores at top of marginal range; a subtle dark outline or pixel-art texture treatment would push it to pass.
